details.emptyText:
v2.1
                    Dual-mode foundation
                    Status: Completed
                    Added same-homepage Website and Portfolio modes while preserving the original tools website content and GitHub Pages structure.
                
            
        
            
                
                
                    v2.2
                    Minimal glass gateway
                    Status: Completed
                    Polished the mode selector into a compact premium gateway overlay with CMS-controlled card labels, descriptions and display options.
                
            
        
            
                
                
                    v2.3
                    Responsive UX hardening
                    Status: Completed
                    Added mobile menus, responsive breakpoints, overflow protection and safer layout behavior for desktop, tablet and phone screens.
                
            
        
            
                
                
                    v2.4
                    CMS, SEO and validation polish
                    Status: Completed
                    Added portfolio timeline, social preview metadata, JSON fallback UI, Pages CMS field upgrades, media workflow guidance and a local validation script.
                
            
        
            
                
                
                    v2.8
                    Single-file deployment rollback
                    Status: Completed
                    Restored one CSS file and one JavaScript file while retaining the gateway, responsive navigation, portfolio timeline, SEO and CMS improvements.
                
            
        
            
                
                
                    v2.8.1
                    Deployment safety audit
                    Status: Completed
                    Aligned gateway fallbacks and cache versions, guarded CMS choices, corrected deployment paths, added a PNG social preview and strengthened local validation.
                
            
        
            
                
                
                    v2.8.2
                    Mobile runtime stability
                    Status: Completed
                    Added resilient JSON loading, true critical-content fallbacks, compact CMS failure reporting, Gateway scroll locking, reload-frame preparation and mobile mode-switch safety spacing.
                
            
        
            
                
                
                    v2.8.3
                    Cross-browser layout and transition polish
                    Status: Current
                    Normalized Gateway positioning across short desktop viewports, removed Firefox programmatic focus outlines, aligned download actions, prevented header navigation overlap and refined same-page mode transitions on phones.

items.description: Added resilient JSON loading, true critical-content fallbacks, compact CMS failure reporting, Gateway scroll locking, reload-frame preparation and mobile mode-switch safety spacing.
